name: The Pit
blurb: An unlicensed fighting ring in a drained coolant cistern three levels under the Grid. No seconds, no spoils, no insurance — the Pit pays in reputation, and the crowd never forgets a name.

founder.name: Ondo “The Bell” Marr
founder.note: The book is theirs. The bell is theirs. The rest is negotiable.

leaderboard.name: Zenith, the Crowd's Own
leaderboard.note: Holds The Apex. Is, on some real level, the crowd.

leaderboard.name: Gravekeeper Lull
leaderboard.note: Retired three times. It never takes.

leaderboard.name: Saint Voltage
leaderboard.note: Canonized themself mid-bout. The paperwork stuck.

leaderboard.name: Mirrorblade Duessa
leaderboard.note: Gatekeeper of the first belt. Fights you with your own face.

leaderboard.name: Kilowatt Kid
leaderboard.note: Fast hands, faster mouth, exactly one good idea.

leaderboard.name: “Handshake” Bree
leaderboard.note: Wins most fights before the bell. Wins the rest after.

leaderboard.name: The Upright Man
leaderboard.note: Has never once ducked. On principle. It shows.

leaderboard.name: Moth
leaderboard.note: Keeps coming back to the light. The crowd loves Moth.

crowd_lines.Unknown: The crowd barely looks up. Earn the look.
crowd_lines.Known Face: A few tiers clock your walk. Somebody says your name wrong, but they say it.
crowd_lines.Name in the Grid: The chant starts in the cheap seats and spreads. They know you now.
crowd_lines.Undercard Legend: The whole tank leans in when you climb down the ladder.
crowd_lines.Crowd's Own: They ring bottles against the scaffold in your rhythm. The Pit is yours before the bell.
